name: @gana-v8/sandbox-runner
description: Isolated sandbox execution entrypoint for smoke, replay, and cron validation workflows.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/domain-core build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/observability build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/storage-adapters build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/testing-fixtures build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/policy-engine build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/domain-core build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/observability build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/storage-adapters build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/testing-fixtures build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/policy-engine build && tsx --test tests/**/*.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/domain-core build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/observability build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/storage-adapters build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/testing-fixtures build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/policy-engine build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.clean: node --eval "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
